name: dispatch
description: Grand Central Dispatch (libdispatch) bindings — serial/concurrent queues, groups, async/sync dispatch
platform_notes: Requires clang with -fblocks. macOS: libdispatch is part of libSystem; the libdispatch registry entry no-ops on brew. Linux/FreeBSD: auto-installs swift-corelibs-libdispatch via the platform package manager.
